name: Phase 1: AI Infograph New Sections
objective: Add 4 new educational sections to the AI/LLM infograph covering: LLMs training pipeline, embeddings & vector search, RAG architecture, and code models
exit_criteria: 4 new React components created in src/components/
Each component follows existing visual style (purple accent, dark mode, 3-col grids)
Interactive elements use React hooks (useState, useMemo)
Component CSS files created alongside each component
All components under 50 lines (split into sub-components if needed)
note: App.tsx integration will be done separately after all components are complete
